{{ tool.icon }} {{ tool.name }}

Each vendor's tax clearance certificate is valid for 3 months from its issue date. A vendor may only be paid when the certificate is valid at the time of payment AND the taxpayer ID is ACTIVE on the DGI Fiscalis platform — the OK to pay column applies both controls.

Reminders go to vendors whose certificate is expired, missing or expiring, or whose NIU is not active — telling them overdue invoices will not be paid until regularised. {% if not smtp_enabled %}(SMTP off — reminders are created as ready-to-send .eml files.){% endif %}
